CORE HOLDS: live working rows' headlines ARE the workers' tmux self-summaries (完成前端E2E测试和图标系统迁移验证 / 修复键盘交互回归问题), not node/branch names; offline/queued rows show launch-prompt placeholders; op tally (~1) + colour-coded status glyph present. Spec/code conflict needs reconciliation: either restore the map-side two-line face or rewrite the desc+scenario to the one-line-everywhere design. Not an icon-migration regression (predates it). Boot-flicker sub-case not re-measured (no fresh dispatch this round).

Silent spec↔code divergence: either restore the strip or retire/rewrite this scenario + the spec clause. Not an icon-migration regression (predates it).
